records.title: System average interruption duration index
records.summary: Track SAIDI by region and cause code to quantify reliability of electricity supply and prioritize infrastructure investment.
records.metric_definition: Total duration of sustained customer interruptions divided by total customers served, in minutes per year.
records.methodology_note: Exclude major event days per IEEE 1366 standard.

records.title: Carbon intensity of generation
records.summary: Measure CO2 equivalent emissions per MWh generated to track decarbonization progress by fuel mix and plant.
records.metric_definition: Total Scope 1 CO2e emissions divided by net MWh generated.

records.title: Grid reliability and cyber resilience
records.summary: Apply defense-in-depth controls to operational technology networks and maintain N-1 contingency capability across critical infrastructure.

records.title: Renewable integration transparency
records.summary: Maintain auditable records of renewable energy certificates, curtailment events, and grid stability metrics as variable generation scales.

records.title: Decarbonization pathway sequencing
records.summary: Sequence investments in renewable capacity, grid modernization, and storage by economic viability and regulatory incentive windows.

records.title: Asset lifecycle optimization
records.summary: Use predictive analytics to shift from time-based to condition-based maintenance, extending asset life and reducing unplanned outages.

records.title: Combine SCADA telemetry with weather and demand forecasts for grid balancing
records.summary: Prioritize use cases that fuse real-time SCADA sensor feeds with weather forecasts and demand predictions to support grid balancing, renewable curtailment decisions, and load-shifting rather than treating each data source in isolation.

records.title: Produce auditable metrics for regulatory compliance reporting
records.summary: Prefer use cases whose outputs — reliability indices, emissions intensity, outage duration — are structured for direct regulatory submission with full derivation traceability, reducing manual compliance preparation effort.
